scenes.text:
Starting is the hardest part.
Everything else gets easier.

The gap between wanting to do something and actually doing it is called the start gap. It is where most dreams go to die. Not because
the task is impossible, but because the first step feels overwhelming. Your brain magnifies the difficulty of starting by ten times. Once you start, it adjusts.

Lower the bar for starting. Your first video does not need to go viral. Your first product does not
need to be perfect. Your first step just needs to be taken. Start ugly. Start messy. Start now.
scenes.highlight: Start ugly. Start messy. Start now.

scenes.text:
The best time to start was yesterday.
The second best time is right now.

What are you starting today? Put it
in writing below. Follow for action content.
